title: IC Skill Frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter in SKILL.md files. Aligns with the Agent Skills spec (agentskills.io/specification). Top-level fields (name, description, license, compatibility) plus metadata block (title, category).

name.description: Unique skill identifier. Lowercase, hyphenated. Must match the directory name under skills/.

description.description: One-sentence summary. Describes when an agent should load this skill and what it covers. This is the primary triggering mechanism for agent skill selection.

title.description: Human-readable display name for the skill.

category.description: Skill category for browsing/filtering. Use an existing category when possible: DeFi, Tokens, Auth, Architecture, Integration, Governance, Frontend, Security, Infrastructure, Wallet.
